tasks.title: Add @slack/bolt dependency
tasks.description: Add @slack/bolt to package.json dependencies. Run pnpm install. Verify bolt is importable.

tasks.title: Create Slack token loader and client wrapper
tasks.description: Create src/utils/slack-client.ts. Load SLACK_BOT_TOKEN and SLACK_APP_TOKEN from ~/.gwrk/.env via dotenv. Export SlackSetupResult type. Fail-fast with process.exit(1) if tokens are missing when Slack is required.

tasks.title: Extend config schema for Slack tokens
tasks.description: In src/utils/config.ts, add Zod schema fields for Slack project config: channelId (string), channelName (string). Replace the existing slackChannel optional string with the structured SlackProjectConfig object.

tasks.title: Implement gwrk setup slack command
tasks.description: Create src/commands/setup-slack.ts. Implement setupSlack() per contracts/slack-setup.md: create Slack app config, write tokens to ~/.gwrk/.env, verify Socket Mode connection. Support --verify flag for test-only mode. Idempotent — detect existing config.

tasks.title: Register setup slack in CLI
tasks.description: In src/cli.ts, register 'setup slack' as a subcommand using Commander. Wire to setupSlack handler. Ensure --verify flag is passed through.

tasks.title: Unit tests for setup and client
tasks.description: Create src/commands/setup-slack.test.ts (TR-001): mock Slack API, verify app creation, token write, idempotency, --verify mode. Create src/server/slack.test.ts (TR-002): mock Bolt App init, verify Socket Mode config.

tasks.title: Create Bolt App instance with server lifecycle
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack.ts. Initialize Bolt App with Socket Mode config from slack-client.ts. Start on server:ready event, stop on server:shutdown event. Export BoltLifecycle interface (start, stop, isConnected).

tasks.title: Wire Bolt into Fastify server
tasks.description: Modify src/server/index.ts. Import and start Bolt App after Fastify is listening. Stop Bolt on server shutdown. Conditionally start only if Slack tokens are configured.

tasks.title: Create channel-per-project logic
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-channel.ts. Implement createOrReuseChannel() using Slack conversations.create API. Re-use existing channel if name collision. Update .gwrkrc.json with channelId and channelName.

tasks.title: Wire channel creation into gwrk init
tasks.description: Modify src/commands/init.ts. After project scaffold, call createOrReuseChannel() if Slack is configured. Replace existing --slack string flag with Slack API integration.

tasks.title: Unit tests for channel management
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-channel.test.ts (TR-009): mock conversations.create, verify re-use on duplicate, config update with channelId/channelName.

tasks.title: Create Block Kit message builders
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-messages.ts. Implement MessageBuilder with methods: phaseStart(), phaseComplete(), phaseFail(), ciResult(), pulseSummary(), doneDone(). Each returns SlackMessage with blocks array and fallback text. Per contracts/block-kit-messages.md.

tasks.title: Create notification dispatcher
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-notify.ts. Implement unified notification dispatcher that resolves project channel from config, posts Block Kit messages via Slack chat.postMessage. Export SlackEvent and SlackMessage types.

tasks.title: Add notification hooks to ship and dispatch
tasks.description: Modify src/commands/ship.ts: emit Slack notifications on phase start/complete/fail. Modify src/server/dispatch.ts: emit events consumed by slack-notify for dispatch lifecycle.

tasks.title: Unit tests for Block Kit messages
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-messages.test.ts (TR-005): verify Block Kit JSON structure for all 7 event types. Assert each message has valid blocks array, text fallback, and correct section types.

tasks.title: Create slash command handlers
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-commands.ts. Implement SlashCommandHandler for 8 commands: status, dispatch, approve, reject, pause, pulse, effort, logs. Each returns Block Kit ephemeral or in-channel response. Per contracts/slash-commands.md.

tasks.title: Create interactive action handlers
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-actions.ts. Handle Merge/Request Changes/View Review button taps. Handle ✅ reaction-to-approve via reaction_added event. Merge triggers gh pr merge. Per contracts/block-kit-messages.md ReviewAction.

tasks.title: Register handlers with Bolt and add health check
tasks.description: Modify src/server/slack.ts: register all slash commands and action handlers with Bolt App. Modify src/server/routes/health.ts: add Slack connection status (isConnected) to health endpoint components.

tasks.title: Unit tests for commands and actions
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-commands.test.ts (TR-003): verify each slash command response format. Create src/server/slack-actions.test.ts (TR-004): verify Merge triggers gh pr merge, reaction handler triggers merge flow.

tasks.title: Integration test for slash commands
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-integration.test.ts (TR-010): start mock Bolt app, send simulated slash command, verify Block Kit response structure.

tasks.title: Create presence poller and notification queue
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-presence.ts. Implement presence poller (60s interval via users.getPresence). Queue notifications when user is away. Deliver batched summary when presence changes to active. Cap batch at 100 events.

tasks.title: Wire presence gate into notification dispatcher
tasks.description: Modify src/server/slack-notify.ts: route messages through presence gate before posting. If user is away, queue in BatchedNotification. Add batchedSummary() method to src/server/slack-messages.ts.

tasks.title: Unit tests for presence throttling
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-presence.test.ts (TR-006): mock user presence changes, verify immediate delivery when active, batched delivery when status changes from away to active, verify batch summary format.

tasks.title: Create App Home Tab builder
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-home.ts. Build Block Kit view with 5 sections: Active Agents, Dispatch Queue, System Resources (CPU/mem/disk), Feature Progress (per-project RAGB status), Pulse summary. Handle app_home_opened event via views.publish.

tasks.title: Register Home Tab handler and export status data
tasks.description: Modify src/server/slack.ts: register app_home_opened event handler. Modify src/server/routes/status.ts: export collectStatus() function for Home Tab consumption (not just HTTP handler).

tasks.title: Unit tests for App Home Tab
tasks.description: Create src/server/slack-home.test.ts (TR-007): mock daemon state (active agents, queue, resources, feature progress), verify Block Kit sections render for all 5 dashboard areas. Verify Server: Offline fallback when server unreachable.
